project.name: AI 漫剧系统
project.styleDefinitionBrief: AI creative platform, pure white base + emerald green accent, clean modern SaaS, system-ui font stack, card-based layout with subtle shadows
project.designRead: SaaS creative tool / content creators / clean modern / medium density / avoid heavy shadows and dark themes

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: emerald green #10B981 for CTAs, active states, and brand accents
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single emerald hue; no secondary/accent brand hue

styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: system-ui stack with PingFang SC + Microsoft YaHei CJK fallback
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 4px base grid, 16-24px section padding, 24-32px component gaps
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: card-based with 1px #F0F0F0 borders, subtle box-shadows, emerald hover accents
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border-first cards with alpha<=0.04 shadows; floating layers may use deeper shadows
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: emoji-based icons inline, gradient decorative backgrounds
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: smooth transitions 200-300ms, translateY hover lifts, scale micro-animations

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: top sticky navbar with logo left, nav items center, CTA right; emerald gradient logo square
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: system-ui font stack, 14px body, 16-18px section titles, 24-48px hero headings
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: white cards with #F0F0F0 border + 0.04 alpha shadow; hover adds emerald border tint + 0.06 shadow
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: emerald gradient bg, white text, rounded-button, shadow-button, translateY(-1px) hover
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: max-w-6xl/7xl centered, px-6 horizontal padding, py-5/8 vertical rhythm

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Pure white base with emerald green (#10B981) accent. System-ui font stack with CJK support. Card-based layout with subtle borders and shadows. Clean modern SaaS aesthetic.

productContext.productType: B2C AI comic drama creation tool

pages.title: 首页
pages.businessScenario: Landing page for AI comic drama creation platform
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean white hero with emerald gradient text, 4-step pipeline cards, feature grid, bottom CTA
pages.compositionPattern: hero-center → 4-column steps → 2-column features → centered CTA → footer

pages.title: 工作台
pages.businessScenario: Creator dashboard with stats, quick actions, and recent projects
pages.visualNorthStar: Sticky navbar with emerald logo, stat cards grid, quick action cards, recent project list
pages.compositionPattern: navbar → welcome header → 4-column stats → 3-column quick actions → recent projects grid

pages.title: 项目详情
pages.businessScenario: Project workspace with linear workflow sidebar and tab-based content area
pages.visualNorthStar: Top bar with breadcrumbs + actions, left workflow sidebar with emerald active state, right content area with project header
pages.compositionPattern: top-bar → sidebar + main content split → project header with badges + step indicators → tab content area
